subcodes.first_line: The springtime of the All-Merciful's grace hath been made manifest in these days, and the Sun of divine bounty hath risen above the horizon of imprisonment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربیع رحمت رحمانی در این ایام ظاهر و شمس عنایت سبحانی از افق سجن طالع جمعی در
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @nearness and remoteness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
